summary: Rain‑filled second set shines with a stellar Rain > Eyes combo and Saint > Drumz > Wheel sequence, though the recording quality is unremarkable.
review: Fans rave about the electric second set – especially the Rain > Eyes transition, the Saint > Drumz > Wheel > Attics medley and a lively Samba in the Rain – while noting a mediocre first set and a few slip‑ups (Jerry sounding half‑asleep, US Blues falling flat). No concrete comments on audio fidelity were offered, so the tape is considered only fair but captures the concert’s vibe.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is above average due to standout second‑set moments; recording quality lacks detail and appears mediocre, yielding a mid‑range overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not discuss sound clarity, mix balance or source type; focus was on atmosphere rather than audio fidelity.

standout_songs: Saint of Circumstance > Drumz > Wheel > Attics
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as slow and mediocre, but the second set erupted with high energy – rain‑themed jams, a flawless Rain > Eyes combo and an extended Saint > Drumz > Wheel medley that lifted the crowd.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Appears half‑asleep at the beginning and end of the show; no other specific remarks.
band_member_comments.Phil: Humorous mic banter and a notable sustained note during the jam were highlighted.
band_member_comments.Keys: Sparkling piano on Eyes of the World and overall bright keyboard texture noted positively.
band_member_comments.Drums: Marathon Drumz into Wheel with an extended intro jam praised for its intensity.
